benefits.description: User reports already feeling effects in first week

side_effects.description: Concerned about gastroparesis risk from GLP-1 compounds; user is on keto diet and maintaining hydration and fiber intake via psyllium husk

protocol_notes: Starting dose 1mg/week Retatrutide. Titration plan: 1mg/week for evaluation period, then consider 0.5mg increases every two weeks if dosing up. On ketogenic diet. Taking psyllium husk for fiber. Reports anxiety about gastroparesis after learning about GLP-1 side effects.
